summary: Modernize sidebar nav and submit-only search
description: Replace the six heavy sidebar nav buttons with a modern compact segmented/pill navigator, remove the right-rail Vault card under the calendar, and make search query-style: typing updates only local input, Enter/Search submits asynchronously without rerendering/lagging the whole app per keystroke.
acceptance: Today/Timeline/Entities/Projects/Files/Detail are no longer rendered as six large grouped buttons; right rail no longer renders the Vault detail card under calendar; search input does not invoke search or rerender on each letter; Enter/Search submits the query and shows running/status results; stale search responses cannot overwrite newer queries.
verification: npm --workspace apps/desktop run test; npm --workspace apps/desktop run build; npm run check; browser DOM/vision smoke

evidence.summary: Modernized sidebar navigation and query search. Replaced three labeled nav groups with compact command-nav grid; removed right-rail Vault detail card under calendar; changed search state from currentSearchQuery debounce-per-letter to searchInputValue/submittedSearchQuery submit-on-Enter/Search with isSearchRunning and request-id stale response guard. Browser DOM smoke: blank=false commandNav=true commandTabCount=6 navGroupCount=0 rightVaultCardCount=0 typing mutations=0 hasSearching=false afterSubmitText=true. Verification: npm --workspace apps/desktop run build; npm --workspace apps/desktop run test; browser visual smoke; npm run check; go validate.
